creator: lioux@gns.com.br
text:
Just an update to the port.

Fix: 

The Makefile, pkg/PLIST, patches/patch-aa and patches/patch-ab
were updated to reflect the new version.
	The updated port can be found at
ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/incoming/egcs.tar.gz
MD5 (egcs.tar.gz) = d89a44386bf1c06588908356bc6793ab
How-To-Repeat: 
	Hopefully, one would only have to try the port.
